title: [Dessert Vibes, Confectionary]
description: The walls are predominantly two-toned and depict a desert landscape, with emerald green sands painted beneath a pale violet sky.  At the horizon where the colors change, silver clouds with black-painted winking expressions further decorate the walls.  In the room's middle, a series of tangerine-hued driftwood crates and a series of silver-hued driftwood boxes are arranged to display wares.  A glaesine orb serves as a lantern for the shop, hung in the room's middle and casting a flickering light.
